backlog.title: Session lifecycle persistence
backlog.gpo_implementation: Save active behavior signals, operator profile cache, and routing stats to a session state file on server shutdown. Restore on startup. Track session duration and task count.

backlog.title: Running verification metrics (pass@1 equivalent)
backlog.gpo_implementation: Track first-pass clean rate as a running behavior signal. On task completion, score output quality: length adequacy, structure presence, source citations. Store as verification_metrics signal.

backlog.title: Periodic workflow pattern extraction from completed tasks
backlog.gpo_implementation: After every N completed tasks, analyze patterns: which engines are used together, common task sequences, preferred output structures. Update workflow-patterns.json.

backlog.title: Lightweight pre-execution prompt validation
backlog.gpo_implementation: Before each provider API call, check: no API keys in prompt text, prompt length within bounds, cost estimate within threshold. Log violations. Do NOT block — warn only for now.

backlog.title: Add reinforcement tracking to behavior signals
backlog.gpo_implementation: Add reinforced_count, last_contradicted, and created_at fields to BehaviorSignal. Signals strengthen when corroborating events arrive, weaken on contradiction.
